name: John F. Kennedy International Airport
premium_summary: JFK is one of the most important premium long-haul gateways in North America, with strong lounge depth, transatlantic connectivity, and multiple flagship business-class departures.

name: London Heathrow Airport
premium_summary: Heathrow is one of the world’s best-known premium long-haul gateways, with excellent airline depth, strong lounges, and broad transatlantic connectivity.

name: Dubai International Airport
premium_summary: Dubai International Airport is one of the strongest premium hubs worldwide, especially for long-haul business class and first class travel.

name: Singapore Changi Airport
premium_summary: Changi is a polished long-haul premium airport known for efficient transfers, premium lounges, and strong Asia connectivity.

name: Tokyo Haneda Airport
premium_summary: Haneda is a highly efficient premium airport for Tokyo-bound long-haul travel, with strong airline quality and convenient city access.
